text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-I can hear it! There's a pulsating energy surging
within my body!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No way! Could I be awakening to a brand-new
power?! This is just like what happens in Princess
Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa! I'm in the zone! I feel like I could bust
a giant meteor into little pieces!
